meta_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code skills setup to Solve can't debug code (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome can't debug code. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Claude Code Debugging Checklist: Faster SaaS Shipping
content.seo_description: Master Claude Code skills to crush bugs in record time. A high-impact, intermediate guide for freelancers using Antigravity and Claude Code to ship faster.
content.answer_block: Stop manually tracing stack traces. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you gain an autonomous diagnostic engine. This setup allows you to identify root causes, simulate edge cases, and generate production-ready patches in seconds, effectively turning your debugging bottleneck into a competitive advantage for client deliverables.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking, the client is waiting, and your terminal is bleeding red errors. You're staring at a stack trace that makes no sense, and the pressure to ship is mounting. We've all been there—trapped in a cycle of 'print-statement-debugging' that drains your billable hours and kills your creative flow.

But the era of manual debugging is over. By leveraging Claude Code as an autonomous agent, you can offload the cognitive heavy lifting to an engine that understands your architecture better than you do. This isn't just about fixing bugs; it's about reclaiming your time and delivering bulletproof code that keeps your clients coming back.

steps.title: Initialize Contextual Awareness
steps.description: Establish a baseline for your project's architecture so the agent understands the dependency graph.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current directory structure and identify the primary entry points and core dependencies for this module.

steps.title: Isolate the Failure Surface
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate a focused diagnostic report to feed into Claude Code for targeted repair.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a summary of the most recent error logs and map them to the specific files triggering the exception.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "Fix the exception identified in the diagnostic report"

steps.title: Automate Regression Testing
steps.description: Ensure your fix doesn't break peripheral features by running a targeted test suite.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a unit test covering the edge case that caused the recent crash.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "Create and run a unit test for the identified bug"

steps.title: Execute Atomic Refactoring
steps.description: Clean up the messy implementation logic that allowed the bug to persist in the first place.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the logic in the failing module for better readability and performance, maintaining existing interfaces.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "Refactor the code to improve robustness without changing functionality"

steps.title: Validate Production Readiness
steps.description: Perform a final audit to ensure the fix meets professional standards before pushing to production.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a code review of the changes made and suggest any final security or performance optimizations.

pro_tips: Always set your context_depth to 3 or higher in large repos to prevent the agent from hallucinating about missing files.
Use Antigravity to generate 'TODO' comments in your code before running Claude; it acts as a roadmap for the AI to follow.
If Claude gets stuck, provide the specific error message as a raw text file; the agent performs better with structured logs.
Create a custom '.claudeprompt' file in your root to define your coding style, ensuring consistency across all automated fixes.
Pipe your test results directly into the Claude terminal session to force the agent to iterate until the exit code is 0.
content.next_steps: Once your debugging workflow is automated, focus on setting up CI/CD pipelines that trigger Claude Code for automated PR reviews.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting your code and start commanding it. With this workflow, you'll slash your debugging time by 70% and become the developer clients trust with their most complex builds. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
